===
Let
===

def foo :=
  let foo := 12
  foo

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    body: (let
      name: (identifier)
      value: (number)
      body: (identifier))))

=============
Let Annotated
=============

def foo :=
  let foo : Nat := 12
  foo

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    body: (let
      name: (identifier)
      type: (identifier)
      value: (number)
      body: (identifier))))

============
Let Function
============

def foo : Nat :=
  let val (x y : Nat) := x + y
  return val 2 3

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    type: (identifier)
    body: (let
      name: (identifier)
      parameters: (parameters
        (explicit_binder
          name: (identifier)
          name: (identifier)
          type: (identifier)))
      value: (binary_expression
        left: (identifier)
        right: (identifier))
      body: (application
        name: (application
          name: (application
            name: (identifier)
            arguments: (identifier))
          arguments: (number))
        arguments: (number)))))

============================
Let Function Bare Parameters
============================

def foo :=
let f a b := 2
f true false

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    body: (let
      name: (identifier)
      parameters: (parameters
        (identifier)
        (identifier))
      value: (number)
      body: (application
        name: (application
          name: (identifier)
          arguments: (true))
        arguments: (false)))))

==============
Let Semicolons
==============

def foo :=
let foo := 12
let bar := 13
let baz := 14
foo + bar + baz

def bar :=
let foo := 12;
let bar := 13;
let baz := 14;
foo + bar + baz

def baz :=
let foo := 12; let bar := 13; let baz := 14;
foo + bar + baz

def quux :=
  let foo := 12
  let bar := 13
  let baz := 14
  foo + bar + baz

---

(module
  (definition
    (identifier)
    (let
      (identifier)
      (number)
      (let
        (identifier)
        (number)
        (let
          (identifier)
          (number)
          (binary_expression
            (binary_expression
              (identifier)
              (identifier))
            (identifier))))))
  (definition
    (identifier)
    (let
      (identifier)
      (number)
      (let
        (identifier)
        (number)
        (let
          (identifier)
          (number)
          (binary_expression
            (binary_expression
              (identifier)
              (identifier))
            (identifier))))))
  (definition
    (identifier)
    (let
      (identifier)
      (number)
      (let
        (identifier)
        (number)
        (let
          (identifier)
          (number)
          (binary_expression
            (binary_expression
              (identifier)
              (identifier))
            (identifier))))))
  (definition
    (identifier)
    (let
      (identifier)
      (number)
      (let
        (identifier)
        (number)
        (let
          (identifier)
          (number)
          (binary_expression
            (binary_expression
              (identifier)
              (identifier))
            (identifier)))))))

==========
No Let Mut
==========

def foo :=
  let mut foo := 12
  foo

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    body: (let
      name: (identifier)
      parameters: (parameters
        (identifier))
      value: (number)
      body: (identifier))))

============
No Let Arrow
============

def foo :=
  let foo <- 12
  foo

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    (ERROR
      (identifier))
    body: (unary_expression
      operand: (application
        name: (number)
        arguments: (identifier)))))

====
Have
====

example : Nat:=
  have : Type := Nat;
  2

---

(module
  (example
    (identifier)
    (have
      (identifier)
      (identifier)
      (number))))

======
Abbrev
======

abbrev Foo := Bar

abbrev Bar : Nat → Nat := f

abbrev Baz {N} [bar N] (h : foo) : Nat → Nat := f

abbrev Baz
| 2 => 2
| _ => 3

@[inline] protected abbrev Spam.Quux := Baz

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    body: (identifier))
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    type: (arrow
      domain: (identifier)
      codomain: (identifier))
    body: (identifier))
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    binders: (binders
      (implicit_binder
        name: (identifier))
      (instance_binder
        type: (application
          name: (identifier)
          arguments: (identifier)))
      (explicit_binder
        name: (identifier)
        type: (identifier)))
    type: (arrow
      domain: (identifier)
      codomain: (identifier))
    body: (identifier))
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    (match_arm
      patterns: (number)
      body: (number))
    (match_arm
      patterns: (hole)
      body: (number)))
  (declaration
    attributes: (attributes
      name: (identifier))
    (definition
      name: (identifier)
      name: (identifier)
      body: (identifier))))

========
Constant
========

constant A : Type
constant B : Type -> Type
constant C : Nat := 3

---

(module
  (constant
    name: (identifier)
    type: (identifier))
  (constant
    name: (identifier)
    type: (arrow
      domain: (identifier)
      codomain: (identifier)))
  (constant
    name: (identifier)
    type: (identifier)
    body: (number)))

==========================
Constant With Missing Type
==========================

constant B

---

(module
  (constant
    (identifier)))

==========================
Constant With Missing Name
==========================

constant

---

(module
  (ERROR))

=============================
Constant With Non-Simple Body
=============================

constant Foo : Nat → Nat
| _ => 3

---

(module
  (constant
    (identifier)
    (application
      (arrow
        (identifier)
        (identifier))
      (ERROR)
      (hole)
      (ERROR)
      (number))))

=====
Axiom
=====

axiom foo : 1 = 2

---

(module
  (axiom
    name: (identifier)
    type: (binary_expression
      left: (number)
      right: (number))))

=======================
Axiom With Missing Name
=======================

axiom : 1 = 2

---

(module
  (axiom
    name: (identifier
      (MISSING _identifier))
    type: (binary_expression
      (number)
      (number))))

========
Deriving
========

inductive Foo
| bar
deriving Inhabited

class inductive Foo
| bar
deriving Inhabited

structure Foo where
deriving Inhabited

class Foo where
deriving Inhabited

---

(module
  (inductive
    name: (identifier)
    constructors: (constructor
      name: (identifier))
    deriving: (identifier))
  (class_inductive
    name: (identifier)
    constructors: (constructor
      name: (identifier))
    deriving: (identifier))
  (structure
    name: (identifier)
    deriving: (identifier))
  (structure
    name: (identifier)
    deriving: (identifier)))

=================
Multiple Deriving
=================

inductive Foo
| bar
deriving Baz, Quux

---

(module
  (inductive
    name: (identifier)
    constructors: (constructor
      name: (identifier))
    deriving: (identifier)
    deriving: (identifier)))

================
Deriving Nothing
================

inductive Foo
| bar
deriving

---

(module
  (inductive
    name: (identifier)
    constructors: (constructor
      name: (identifier)))
  (ERROR))
